const temporaryStep = `
      - name: Apply one-run compact post-results maintenance
        id: compact_post_results_maintenance
        if: \${{ inputs.task == 'typecheck' }}
        continue-on-error: true
        working-directory: .
        run: node lensically-worker/scripts/run-compact-maintenance.mjs

      - name: Commit compact maintenance outcome
        if: \${{ inputs.task == 'typecheck' && always() }}
        working-directory: .
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: \${{ github.token }}
          GH_REPOSITORY: \${{ github.repository }}
        run: |
          git config user.name "lensically-engineering"
          git config user.email "lensically-engineering@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add -A
          if git diff --cached --quiet; then
            exit 0
          fi
          if [ "\${{ steps.compact_post_results_maintenance.outcome }}" = "success" ]; then
            message="Add compact published-post verification [operator-tests]"
          else
            message="Record compact maintenance diagnostic"
          fi
          git commit -m "$message"
          git push "https://x-access-token:${GH_TOKEN}@github.com/${GH_REPOSITORY}.git" HEAD:main

      - name: Surface compact maintenance failure
        if: \${{ inputs.task == 'typecheck' && steps.compact_post_results_maintenance.outcome == 'failure' }}
        run: exit 1
`;
